html:
Exclusive to:

The Moon Shroom is a Vegetable Food item that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be harvested from Lunar Mushtrees or Naked Mole Bat Burrows, both inside the Lunar Grotto. Eating it raw will restore 12.5 and 10 . It also applies 6.6 seconds of Grogginess, slowing down the player.

Mixing uncooked Moon Shrooms along with uncooked Red, Green and Blue Caps inside a Crock Pot will make the Mushy Cake, which increases sleep resistance.

Cooked Moon Shroom

Cooked Moon Shroom is a vegetable food item made by Cooking a Moon Shroom on a fire. Eating it will cost 12.5 and 10 . It will also remove all effects of Grogginess from the player.

Usage

×4

×2

×4

×2

Trivia

  • The Moon Shroom and Cooked Moon Shroom were introduced in the Forgotten Knowledge update.
  • All other mushrooms stem faces left, while the moon shrooms faces right.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

"moon_cap"
“It doesn't look particularly appetizing.”
–Wilson
“What a weird looking mushroom.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang tired of mushrooms.”
–Wolfgang
“It took nourishment from dead things, now its death will nourish me.”
–Wendy
“ANOTHER FILTHY FUNGUS”
–WX-78
“It seems to possess strong sleep inducing properties.”
–Wickerbottom
“Not sure if I should be eatin' that.”
–Woodie
“Strange, my eyelids are getting heavy just looking at it.”
–Maxwell
“Despicable nön-meat!”
–Wigfrid
“It looks weird.”
–Webber
“It would add a lovely pop of color... perhaps to a pasta dish.”
–Warly
“Sleepytime”
–Wormwood
“Anyone wanna volunteer to try it?”
–Winona
“Why not cap the day off with a little snooze? Hyuyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Glurgh, make eyes feel heavy.”
–Wurt
“Another mushroom that isn't in my handbook...”
–Walter
“A mutated mushroom, what could go wrong?”
–Wanda
The Moon Shroom is a Vegetable Food item that is exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be harvested from Lunar Mushtrees or Naked Mole Bat Burrows, both inside the Lunar Grotto. Eating it raw will restore 12.5 and 10 . It also applies 6.6 seconds of Grogginess, slowing down the player.
Mixing uncooked Moon Shrooms along with uncooked Red, Green and Blue Caps inside a Crock Pot will make the Mushy Cake, which increases sleep resistance.

“The things I do in the name of science...”
–Wilson
“Once again, fire makes it better.”
–Willow
“It is changed.”
–Wolfgang
“All is malleable.”
–Wendy
“MODIFIED FUNGUS”
–WX-78
“How odd. Once cooked, they seem to act as a stimulant.”
–Wickerbottom
“The smell's enough to wake you up.”
–Woodie
“Odd, but not unpleasant.”
–Maxwell
“Such a thing will never pass my lips!”
–Wigfrid
“We're not sure about this...”
–Webber
“Hm. It has quite the... interesting aroma.”
–Warly
“Wakey wakey”
–Wormwood
“Wouldn't have minded having some of these around when I was pulling overtime.”
–Winona
“Why you tricky thing, you've changed!”
–Wortox
“Taste diffent now.”
–Wurt
“This doesn't seem like the smartest idea.”
–Walter
“Why does it have to smell like old cheese?”
–Wanda
